---
title: "The Iconicity Seminar"
description: |
  An annual conference dedicated to linguistic iconicity.
site: distill::distill_website
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

The 5th Iconicity Seminar will be held on 1-3 April 2027 in Daejeon, South Korea.
